positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a playful woodland scene. A group of stylized forest animals (fox, rabbit, owl, squirrel) are gathered around a central, glowing mushroom. The style is clean, Scandinavian flat design with thick, uniform outlines and pops of vibrant, jewel-toned colors (teal, mustard yellow, burnt orange). The composition is circular and balanced, perfect for a chest print. Use negative space heavily to emphasize the silhouettes. The lighting is soft, internal glow emanating from the mushroom, casting gentle shadows. Highly detailed vector lines, suitable for screen printing.
